backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the backend with user profile management, booking request submission, and admin-only retrieval endpoints, all protected by role-based access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting that the Gallery section was removed from the landing page, including changes to App.tsx, SiteFooter.tsx, and SiteHeader.tsx.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted text file containing one-line summaries of all frontend source files, describing their purpose and recent changes such as theme updates and gallery removal.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the light and dark color themes used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite app with SEO meta tags, Open Graph, and Twitter Card metadata branded for Avsarvatika marriage hall.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that renders the public landing page (Hero, Specialist, BrideGroomEntry, Event, Facilities, Packages, ContactBooking) or the admin panel view, with GallerySection removed.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminReque: Admin view that fetches and displays paginated booking requests with details like name, phone, email, date, and package badge.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Button component that handles Internet Identity login and logout, showing a spinner during the login process.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal dialog that prompts a newly authenticated user to enter their name and saves it via the saveCallerUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/components/BookingRequestFo: Booking request form component with validation, field state management, and submission via a React Query mutation, styled with green-tinted inputs and primary-colored focus states.
frontend/src/components/sections/AboutSe: Landing page About section displaying four feature cards (Excellence, Personalized Service, Trusted Venue, Premium Quality) with icons and descriptions.
frontend/src/components/sections/Banquet: Landing page Banquet section showcasing venue features (capacity, catering, sound/light, ambiance) and key stats like guest count and years of service.
frontend/src/components/sections/BrideGr: Landing page section presenting three bride and groom entry styles (Floral, Royal Chariot, Fog Effect) as cards over a full-bleed background image.
frontend/src/components/sections/Contact: Renders a contact and booking section with phone, email, address info, WhatsApp CTA buttons, and an embedded BookingRequestForm component.
frontend/src/components/sections/DecorSe: Displays a decoration services section with three themed cards (Floral Elegance, Custom Themes, Stage & Mandap) and a closing tagline about the in-house decoration team.
frontend/src/components/sections/EventSe: Shows a grid of four event types the venue hosts (weddings, birthdays, engagements, anniversaries) with icons, descriptions, and a 'Most Popular' badge on weddings.
frontend/src/components/sections/Facilit: Lists venue facilities across four categories (Venue Features, Amenities, Services, Outdoor Spaces) in a two-column card grid with checkmark icons.
frontend/src/components/sections/Gallery: Implements a filterable image gallery with category buttons and a lightbox dialog supporting previous/next navigation for venue photos.
frontend/src/components/sections/HeroSec: A minimal full-screen hero section that displays a single full-bleed background image of the decorated venue stage.
frontend/src/components/sections/Package: Renders three pricing package cards (Classic, Premium, Luxury) with feature lists, prices, a WhatsApp inquiry button, and a callback to select a package for the booking form.
frontend/src/components/sections/Seminar: Presents corporate event facilities (AV setup, Wi-Fi, refreshments, event management) in a grid alongside three stat highlights for seating capacity, configurations, and booking options.
frontend/src/components/sections/Special: Renders a 'Our Team' section with three specialist cards (Event Coordinators, Wedding Planners, Culinary Experts) using icons and optional card images in a responsive grid layout.
frontend/src/components/sections/Testimo: Displays a grid of six client testimonials with star ratings, quote text, and avatar initials for a marriage hall venue.
frontend/src/components/SiteFooter.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand info, quick navigation links, and contact details (address, phone, WhatsApp, email) using BRAND constants.
frontend/src/components/SiteHeader.tsx: Sticky site header with desktop and mobile (Sheet drawer) navigation menus that smooth-scroll to page sections using anchor links.
frontend/src/constants/brand.ts: Exports a BRAND constant containing the business name, tagline, contact details, and address for Avsarvatika marriage hall.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) access, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for backend interactions including fetching/saving user profiles, checking admin status, submitting booking requests, and paginating booking requests.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that configures Tailwind base/components/utilities and defines a greenery-themed CSS custom property palette for both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, typography/container-queries/animate plugins, and custom fonts and keyframes for accordion animations.
project_state.json: Tracks project state at version 3, recording a single completed feature to remove the GallerySection component and related navigation links from the landing page.
